recommendations.overview: The story of Giancarlo Siani, a journalist killed by the Neapolitan Mafia in 1985.

recommendations.title: 5 Star Christmas
recommendations.overview: When the Italian Premier and his companion find a dead body in his hotel suite, while on a trip to Hungary, they find themselves embroiled in a series of comedic situations as they try to avoid a scandal.
